title: Fiery Italian Chocolate Cookies
description: Mustardy, bouncy-qq cookies with dark chocolate chips and a fiery kick, perfect for a quick energizing dessert.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, salt, and chili flakes.
In a separate large bowl, beat butter, brown sugar and white sugar until light and fluffy.
Add egg, vanilla, and dijon mustard to the butter mixture and blend until combined.
Gradually stir in the dry ingredients until just incorporated.
Fold in the dark chocolate chips and espresso powder gently.
Drop tablespoon-sized dough onto the prepared baking sheet, spacing 2 inches apart.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until edges are set but centers remain soft.
Let cookies cool on the sheet for 5 minutes, then transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve warm or store in an airtight container at room temp for up to 5 days.
